body:
This pull request changes the compat entry for the `CUDAdrv` package from `^3.1, ^5` to `^3.1, ^5, 6.0`.

This keeps the compat entries for earlier versions.

Note: I have not tested your package with this new compat entry. It is your responsibility to make sure that your package tests pass before you merge this pull request.
title: CompatHelper: bump compat for "CUDAdrv" to "6.0"

body:
This pull request changes the compat entry for the `CUDAapi` package from `^1.1, ^2` to `^1.1, ^2, 4.0`.

This keeps the compat entries for earlier versions.

Note: I have not tested your package with this new compat entry. It is your responsibility to make sure that your package tests pass before you merge this pull request.
title: CompatHelper: bump compat for "CUDAapi" to "4.0"
